CREATE TABLE test_rounding (value Float32);
INSERT INTO test_rounding VALUES (2.5), (3.5), (4.5);
SELECT value, round(value) AS rounded_value FROM test_rounding;
SELECT value, round(value, 1) AS rounded_value_1 FROM test_rounding;
SELECT value, round(value, 0) AS rounded_value_0 FROM test_rounding;
SELECT value, round(value, -1) AS rounded_value_neg_1 FROM test_rounding;
SELECT round(value / 3, 2) AS rounded_value_div_3 FROM test_rounding;
SELECT round(cast(value AS Decimal(10, 2)), 1) AS rounded_decimal FROM test_rounding;
CREATE TABLE precision_test (value Decimal(10, 4));
INSERT INTO precision_test VALUES (1.2345), (1.2355), (1.2365);
SELECT value, round(value, 2) AS rounded_decimal_value FROM precision_test;
WITH (SELECT value FROM precision_test) AS subquery SELECT round(value) FROM subquery;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (id UInt32, amount Float32);
INSERT INTO multi_table_test VALUES (1, 1.234), (2, 2.678), (3, 3.456);
SELECT mt.id, mt.amount, round(mt.amount) AS rounded_amount FROM multi_table_test mt;
SELECT mt.id, round(mt.amount, 1) AS rounded_amount_1, round(mt.amount, 0) AS rounded_amount_0 FROM multi_table_test mt;
SELECT mt.id, round(mt.amount / 2, 2) AS rounded_half_amount FROM multi_table_test mt;
SELECT round(sub.amount / 2, 1) AS rounded_half FROM (SELECT amount FROM multi_table_test) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE join_test (test_id UInt32, allocation Float32);
INSERT INTO join_test VALUES (1, 1.99), (2, 2.50), (3, 3.51);
SELECT jt.test_id, round(jt.allocation) AS rounded_allocation FROM join_test jt JOIN multi_table_test mt ON jt.test_id = mt.id;
SELECT jt.test_id, round(jt.allocation + mt.amount, 1) AS rounded_combined FROM join_test jt JOIN multi_table_test mt ON jt.test_id = mt.id;
